title: What's New in Uniface 10 Compared to Uniface 9
breadcrumbs: What's New in Uniface 10 Compared to Uniface 9
text: What's New in Uniface 10 Compared to Uniface 9 Uniface 10 features the Uniface IDE, a powerful new development environment for developing Uniface applications. Developers coming from Uniface 9 will need to become familiar with some new concepts and terminology. Some terms have been redefined, and the Repository has been significantly changed. The following topics describe the most significant changes. Other changes are described in Uniface 10: Changes per Release . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
